confirmed_issues.description: Prettier formatting violation in scripts/pipeline-watcher.js at line 1353: chained .slice(0,300).replace() call needs to be broken onto separate lines per prettier multi-line rules. ESLint reports 1 error (prettier/prettier). The 9 warnings are pre-existing react-hooks and react-refresh warnings introduced in prior sprints.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: A recent commit to scripts/pipeline-watcher.js (merge of PR #200 or adjacent commit) added or modified the stopSummary line without running eslint --fix, leaving .slice(0, 300).replace(/\r?\n+/g, ' ') on one line where prettier wants them split across multiple lines.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Run eslint --fix on scripts/pipeline-watcher.js to auto-correct formatting. Zero logic changes.

confirmed_not_issues.description: permission_ea_bridge: ALL checks confirmed — missing key (401), unconfigured secret (503 + error_log), hash_equals (403), missing user_id (400), invalid user_id (403), wp_set_current_user binding. Auth-success observability log confirmed. CORRECT.

Stale rejection at 300s (422), warn-only 120-300s, OHLC guard, epoch guard (pre-2000 rejection), M1 candle age guard (180s), M15 candle age guard (1800s), tick_volume guard, bid/ask finite positive check, map_symbol_aliases(). ALL CONFIRMED CORRECT.

confirmed_not_issues.system: MQL5 EA vs PHP Payload Parity
confirmed_not_issues.description: EA sends user_id in ALL bridge payloads: market-stream (JSON body), heartbeat (JSON body), account-sync (JSON body), symbol-sync (JSON body), license-check (query string ?user_id=N). Dispatch logs at each send point. PHP permission_ea_bridge() reads user_id via ea_request_value() (JSON body + query fallback). ALL CONFIRMED CORRECT per 2026-05-17 patches.
Returns HTTP 401 for unauthenticated requests via permission_user. EXPECTED BEHAVIOR.

is_live derived from backend freshness=LIVE && source=mt5 in class-market-data-service.php. FreshnessBadge reads state from backend. useEngineHealth() has staleTime:0. No age computed from fetch time. VerdictBadge reads backend Verdict type. CORRECT.

All 4 Phase 1 routes implemented: POST /ea/heartbeat, POST /ea/account-sync, POST /ea/symbol-sync, GET /ea/license-check. All use permission_ea_bridge. user_id injected in all payloads. Observability logs present. Awaiting live terminal validation.
9 pre-existing ESLint warnings (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps, react-refresh/only-export-components) in UI components. Not blocking, not introduced by this workflow.
php -l PASS on smc-superfib-sniper.php (v13.0.3) and class-market-data-service.php. No syntax errors.
npm run build PASS — all modules compiled, SSR bundle generated. Chunk size warnings are informational only.
npm run check:mql PASS — all includes present and syntactically valid.

migration_blockers.description: Live MT5 terminal verification still pending for /ea/heartbeat, /ea/account-sync, /ea/symbol-sync, /ea/license-check. All code is implemented and regression-covered per 2026-05-17 patches. Requires Track A live terminal execution.
migration_blockers.status: PENDING — BLOCKED ON TRACK A LIVE TESTING
